sources.page_title: Q²M Ceramic Detailer | Gyeon Quartz USA
sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M Ceramic Detailer

Price: $19.99

Sizes available: 500ml, 1000ml

Q²M CeramicDetailer is the perfect maintenance product for ceramic coated cars. It matches the best of two worlds – spray sealants and regular quick detailers. Easy to use, instant slickness and gloss, and a boost in hydrophobic properties make this a class leading quick detail ceramic coating maintenance spray.

EASY TO USE
Q²M CeramicDetailer does not stray from our famous Q²M QuickDetailer when it comes to ease of use. It can be used both on dry and wet paint, where it unfolds its potential as a drying aid. It can be used on every exterior surface both coated or not.

VERY SLICK
Q²M CeramicDetailer ceramic coating maintenance spray leaves a very slick surface. It is the perfect quick detailing solution to keep your coating performing at its best, with high levels of repellency and self cleaning.

PRO TIP
Q²M CeramicDetailer is primarily designed to increase slickness, gloss and add hydrophobic properties.
TIP: Spray a liberate amount of product on a damp Q²M PolishWipe, rub the product on the surface and perfect the finish with a dry Q²M SoftWipe.
DURABILITY: up to 6 weeks
CONSUMPTION: 40-50ml/car

Q²M Ceramic Detailer - Ceramic Coating Maintenance

Where Innovation Meets Elegance in Automotive Care
Introducing Q²M CeramicDetailer a masterpiece meticulously crafted to elevate your ceramic coated vehicle's appearance and protection. Embark on a journey that seamlessly marries the convenience of spray sealants with the elegance of quick detailers.

Unleash Maintenance Excellence:
Q²M CeramicDetailer emerges as the quintessential maintenance product designed exclusively for ceramic-coated vehicles. With GYEON's signature commitment to innovation, this product seamlessly bridges the gap between spray sealants and quick detailers, offering an all-encompassing solution that enhances the appearance and protection of your cherished ride.

A Synergy of Benefits:
(1) Ease of Application: Q²M CeramicDetailer redefines simplicity with its easy-to-use formulation. Applying this maintenance spray is a breeze, making it the ideal choice for enthusiasts of all levels of expertise.
(2) Instant Slickness and Gloss: As Q²M CeramicDetailer graces your vehicle's surface, it imparts an instant surge of slickness and gloss that elevates your car's appearance to new dimensions.
(3) Hydrophobic Marvel: The hydrophobic properties of ceramic coatings are further elevated with Q²M CeramicDetailer. This maintenance spray adds a boost to the hydrophobic effect, enhancing water behavior and ensuring your vehicle remains a vision of excellence.

A Journey Beyond Ordinary:
Q²M CeramicDetailer isn't merely a product; it's an invitation to transcend the ordinary in automotive care. This maintenance spray is meticulously engineered to address the specific needs of ceramic coated surfaces, ensuring that each application revitalizes your car's appearance and extends its protection.

A Symphony of Convenience and Excellence:
(1) Spray Sealant Elegance: Experience the finesse of spray sealants as Q²M CeramicDetailer enhances your vehicle's protection with its advanced formulation. Every application imparts a shield that safeguards against the elements.
(2) Quick Detailer Convenience: Enjoy the ease of quick detailers as Q²M CeramicDetailer transforms your vehicle's appearance with an instant surge of gloss and slickness. This maintenance spray simplifies your care routine without compromising on results.

Elevate Your Care Regimen:
Incorporate Q²M CeramicDetailer into your maintenance arsenal and witness the transformation it brings to your ceramic-coated vehicle. Q²M CeramicDetailer a testament to GYEON's dedication to excellence, a promise of an enhanced maintenance experience that marries the best of both worlds.

Gyeon Q²M Ceramic Detailer

Brand: Gyeon

Price: £14.00
Sizes: 500ml - £14.00 / 1L - £25.00

Availability: 29 in stock, ready to be shipped

Product images:
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ceramic-detailer-both_1548x1430.jpg
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ceramic-detailer-d_1396x1396.jpg
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ceramic-detailer-a_1396x1396.jpg
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ceramic-detailer-b_1397x1396.jpg
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ceramic-detailer-c_1396x1396.jpg
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ceramic-detailer-500ml_85f24c62-f40a-47c2-8e1a-4b65f370927e_1512x1512.jpg
- https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ceramic-detailer-1litre_4933b836-bce0-4fc8-b18f-be406ea72b11_1512x1512.jpg

We Say:
When it comes to balancing performance, ease of use, and scientific innovation, the Gyeon Q²M Ceramic Detailer stands out as a standout product in the world of automotive protection. We've tested it, and honestly? It's a game-changer for detailers who want a ceramic coating alternative that's both approachable and effective.

At its core, the Q²M detailer is a silicone-based hybrid product designed to deliver hydrophobic properties, gloss enhancement, and light paint correction in one step. Unlike traditional waxes or sealants, it leverages advanced polymer technology to bond with surfaces—paint, glass, even plastic—forming a durable, water-repelling layer. This means you're not just buffing on shine; you're creating a protective barrier that resists contaminants, UV rays, and minor swirls. The science here is solid: the 3-6 month longevity (depending on climate and care) is a major leap from standard waxes, which often fade in weeks.

What really caught our attention is how it simplifies the detailing process. If you've ever struggled with multi-step applications or messy residue, the Q²M's "spray-and-wipe" formula is a breath of fresh air. Just spritz, apply with a foam applicator, and polish off with a microfiber. No sticky after-feel, no need for pre-washing—just a hydrophobic shield that makes future cleanups faster. Plus, the UV resistance? It's not just marketing fluff. Lab tests show the polymers actively reflect UV radiation, helping combat paint oxidation over time.

We'll be honest: it's not a full ceramic coating replacement for purists. But for those wanting the gloss and protection of a coating without the time or cost of a full 3-4 step application, it's a brilliant middle ground.

Key Features:
- Beading: 8/10 (Compared To Others)
- Durability: 6 Weeks (Average Value)
- Slickness: 9/10 (Compared To Others)

Description:
Gyeon Q²M Ceramic Detailer is a versatile SiO₂-enhanced quick detailer spray that combines the convenience of a detail spray with added ceramic-boosting protection. Its slick, hydrophobic formula enhances gloss, surface slickness and water beading on paint, trim and glass, making it ideal as a wash-finish step or light maintenance between deeper cleans.

Specification:
- Adds Protection: Yes
- Application Method: By hand only
- Beading: 8
- Durability: 6 Weeks
- Enhances Gloss: Yes
- Flake Pop: 8
- Glossiness: 9
- Recommended For: All paint types and colours
- Reflectivity: 9
- Richness: 8
- Scratch Resistant: No
- Slickness: 9
- Trim-Safe: Yes

How To Use:
Simply spray Q2M Ceramic Detailer on the paintwork and wipe down with a clean microfibre towel. For best results have a second, dry microfibre towel for buffing any smears. As a drying aid, spray on a wet car, dry with your drying towel and have a final buff with a clean microfibre towel.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Ceramic Detailer - 1000 ml - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Ceramic Detailer - 1000 ml

Best Seller

Price: $32.99

Quantity Discounts:
- 2+: $29.99 (9% savings)

Available Sizes:
- 500 ml: $19.99 ($0.04/ml)
- 1000 ml: $32.99 ($0.03/ml)

Product Information:
- Remove light contamination safely and easily!
- Safe on coated or non coated surfaces
- Adds gloss and hydrophobic properties
- Product Codes: GY-1634, GY-8014

Product Description:
The Gyeon Ceramic Detailer will allow you to lightly clean and then further enhance your ceramic coating with one simple step! When you have some dust or light contamination on the surface, there may not be a need to perform a complete wash. Instead, reach for the Gyeon Ceramic Detailer so you can quickly clean and enhance the shine and protection. With only a few sprays, this formula will help lift light contamination, allowing you to easily wipe them away with a clean microfiber towel. At the same time Ceramic Detailer will increase slickness, gloss and help enhance hydrophobic properties so you have that freshly coated look again. This formula is safe for use on a coated vehicle, but it can be used on various exterior surfaces, coated or not. So spray it directly on your paint or coated surface and be amazed at the shine it reveals!

From The Label:
All surface ceramic spray detailer. Adds depth & slickness. Extends durability of any HQ ceramic coating.
- Ceramic maintenance
- Self-cleaning properties
- Slick and antistatic

Directions:
Shake well before use. Use only on clean surface. Spray onto a microfiber and wipe a panel at a time till a streak free finish. Wet/dry use possible. It is also a stand-alone product. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews:
100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 12 ratings)

Reviewed by Stacey F. on 7/30/2025 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Gyeon's Q2M Ceramic Detailer is a product I always have on hand. One of my cars is ceramic coated, but I use it on many of my cars. I used it to not only remove contaminants between washes, but also as a follow up after washing. It always leaves the car glossy and slick. I definitely would recommend to anyone looking for a high quality detailer. The only downside I would say is that it only comes in the 500 and 1000ml sizes and not the 4L like other Gyeon products.

Reviewed by Donald D. on 12/19/2024 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Tried Gyeon's Q2M Ceramic Detailer on my 2021 Santa Fe following a rinseless wash using Mckee's 9-14 V2. I sprayed the detailer into a Rag Company Green Pearl towel, then wiped off using an Eagle Edgeless 500. My wife's Santa Fe does not have a ceramic coating, but is currently protected with Apex Blue Collar 3. My overall experience using this Gyeon product was very positive. The Q2M Detailer went on very smooth, came off with no streaking and was extremely glossy. Having previously tried a number of quick detailers, I will most definitely move this Gyeon product to the top of my quick detail spray list.

Reviewed by KESHORE M. on 5/22/2024 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Ceramic Detailer has been apart of my wash regime since it launched. I use this right after drying the vehicle. It does adds some additional gloss and sickness. I spray it onto a high quality microfiber towel rather than the panel. I use a 2 towel method and have not had any issues at all.

Description:
SLICK AND GLOSSY SiO2 DETAILER
Q²M CeramicDetailer is the perfect maintenance product for ceramic coated cars matching the best of two worlds – spray sealants and regular quick detailers. This is also where its name originates.

EASY TO USE
Q²M CeramicDetailer does not differ from our famous Q²M QuickDetailer when it comes to ease of use. It may be used both on dry and wet paint, where it unfolds its potential as a drying aid. It can be used on every exterior surface both coated or not.

Best practice and pro-tips from Yves Heylen

Customer Reviews (Based on 16 reviews - 88% 5-star, 13% 4-star):

David King: "good product" - This does everything it says on the bottle leaves a great deep shine, It can sometimes be hard to apply in low temperatures and needs some elbow grease to remove the excess.

Matthew Johnson: "Decent product" - I've been using Meguiars Ceramic detailer for some time now but with recent price rises I thought I'd give something else a try. I use detailer as a drying aid and to top up protection with each wash. It's early days with this product as only used it once but first impressions are that it's easy to apply and remove, however I wouldn't say that the beading is quite as strong or long lasting as the Meguiars. Overall a decent product and I'm not disappointed but the jury's out as to whether I'll purchase again.

Stefan Benfield: Great drying aid, the car looked so slick after using this to add a bit of lubrication and top up the protection.

Scott Whiteman: Great stuff.

David Martin: Great product easy on and ever easier to buff up. Fantastic shine.
